typescript.notes: src/state/memory-store.ts is a monolithic 293-line SQLite-backed store with encryption, PII redaction, FTS, and a 10k namespace limit, but no Auto/Micro/Ship CMMS routing.

python.notes: runtime/memory_store.py exposes Auto/Micro/Ship-related members and tier config; runtime/memory_encrypt.py remains absent from the Python side.
